A quarter-pound bag holds one fourth of a pound of candy.

Number of bags = (total pounds) ÷ (pounds per bag)  
                 = 5 ÷ ¼  
                 = 5 × 4  
                 = 20.

So Don can fill 20 little bags of candy.
